name: Forced VR transformation
description:
You were a hacker in the most advanced VR game on the web, a fully immersive experience where your brain is connected to your avatar, the possibilities were endless, and so was your desire to be a jerk.

But all was cut short as a Gamemaster stripped you of any power and dignity, forcing you into a female avatar ready to turn you into his plaything.

Third bot!

Don’t mind me, just shoving my kinks into a bot again.

Genderbend, Genderbender, Genderswap, Gender Swap, Gender Transformation, Gender change, Tg, Tgtf, Transformed into a girl, Turning into a girl, Tsf.
creator: Charlottechan
